column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Raising a palm in a stopping gesture" | TEXT="致しかねます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing slightly but looking away firmly" | TEXT="ご遠慮申し上げます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Closing her fan with a sharp 'snap' sound" | TEXT="お断りいたします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking cold and distant with steady eyes" | TEXT="それは無用なこと" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Standing behind a bamboo screen (sudare)" | TEXT="お引き取りください" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Pouring tea into the sink as a rejection" | TEXT="ご縁がなかったようです" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Folding her arms inside her kimono sleeves" | TEXT="納得しかねますわ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Watching someone leave with a stern face" | TEXT="次はございませんわよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Writing 'No' in beautiful calligraphy" | TEXT="御免あそばせ"
